name: filipiniana
description: Modern Filipiniana — flat vector, Ocean Blue / Rust Red / Pearl palette
styleGuide: Modern Filipiniana flat vector style. Clean bold lines with a slight offset color fill. Strict color palette: Ocean Blue (#457B9D), Rust Red (#8B2635), Pearl (#EAE0D5). No gradients, no shadows, minimal paths, sophisticated and minimal.
negativePrompt: gradients, drop shadows, photorealism, green, brown, extra colors outside the palette
